title: The forest dark monster
description: A mod that adds an entity that will haunt you during the game, but if you are careless, it can find you.
body:
Have you ever felt that the forest in Minecraft is looking at you? That his shadows move differently, and the whisper of the wind sounds too ominous? Get ready for the fact that your perception of familiar forests will change forever.

Deep in the darkest thickets, where sunlight barely penetrates through the crowns of centuries-old trees, a lumberjack once lived. His axes sang the song of destruction, and greed was stronger than any wisdom. He hacked non-stop, ignoring ancient whispers and warning signs, uprooting the hearts of the forest for profit.

But the forest wasn't empty. In its roots, in the air, in the shadow of every leaf, the Ancient Guardian Spirits of primordial wildness slumbered. Their patience ran out. Their anger was inflamed. The whisper turned into a roar, and the calmness turned into rage.

At night, when the lumberjack was asleep, wrapped in dreams of wealth, the Spirits awakened the Fire. Not just fire, but a living, devouring flame born out of a curse and pain. The forest was burning. The trees screamed, their crowns turned into a fiery inferno, and the ground cracked from the unbearable heat. And in the heart of this burning purgatory, a lumberjack died, burned to ashes along with the fruits of his greed.

But death did not free him. His spirit, cursed by the rage of the Spirits and his own guilt, remained bound to this scorched, mutilated forest. Now he is not just a shadow, but the embodiment of unquenchable malice. The Lumberjack is a Ghost.

He still wanders between charred trunks and new, young shoots, chasing anyone who dares to go too deep. You will hear the thud of an axe, which is not there; you will see silhouettes flashing where no one should be. His goal is not just to kill, but also to inflict the same pain that he himself once inflicted on the forest. Each new player who falls from his invisible axe becomes another link in the chain of his endless agony and revenge.

This modification will immerse you in a world where nature remembers and takes revenge. Would you dare to enter the forest knowing that you are being hunted by a spirit born from fire and a curse?

Careful, adventurer. His axe is waiting.
